_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to use addition and subtraction facts to 20 to work with bigger numbers in our heads.

_source.w: We are learning to use addition and subtraction facts to 20 to work with bigger numbers in our heads.
y: When we know small number facts really well, we can use them to solve much bigger problems.
Mental maths saves time and builds confidence with numbers.
Strong number facts are the foundation for all the maths we do — they make everything easier.
eg: Subtracting 99 by taking away 100 and adding 1 back.
